project.name: SolvynHQ
project.description: Premium B2B/B2C website & product development for Solvyn luxury sunscreen brand

tasks.name: WordPress & Elementor Setup
tasks.description: WordPress installation, hosting configuration, admin access. Elementor Pro activation.

tasks.name: Global Styles (Fonts, Colors, Spacing)
tasks.description: Configure Elementor global settings: Playfair Display (headlines), Inter (body). Colors: Olive Green #6C7B5A, Soft Sand #EAE4D9, Muted Rust #B96E5C, Deep Charcoal #2A2A2A, Off-White #F7F5F0. Global spacing, container widths, default button styles.

tasks.name: Header / Navigation
tasks.description: Responsive navigation: logo placement, desktop menu links (About, Shield, Partners, Discover, Contact), mobile hamburger menu, scroll-aware sticky behavior. Consistent across all pages.

tasks.name: Footer
tasks.description: DTC waitlist block ("Be the first to experience Solvyn at home" + email input), B2B reminder link, nav links, Instagram social link, legal text. Deep charcoal background, clean minimal design.

tasks.name: Media Library & Asset Upload
tasks.description: Upload product photography, lifestyle images, team headshots, partner logos, icons. Organize and optimize file sizes. Use Unsplash placeholders where final assets aren't ready.

tasks.name: Pouch Design Concept & Direction
tasks.description: Overall visual direction for the Shield single-use pouch packaging. Layout, typography, brand elements, and premium look & feel.

tasks.name: Dieline Design
tasks.description: Print-ready dieline layout for the Shield pouch. Structural template with bleed, safe zones, and fold lines.

tasks.name: Ingredients & Compliance Label
tasks.description: FDA Drug Facts panel, ingredients list, usage directions, warnings, and regulatory compliance text. Formatted for pouch print specs.

tasks.name: Color Version 1
tasks.description: First color variant of the Shield pouch design — full artwork applied to dieline.

tasks.name: Color Version 2
tasks.description: Second color variant of the Shield pouch design — alternate colorway applied to dieline.

tasks.name: Design Revision Round 1
tasks.description: First round of revisions based on feedback. Adjustments to layout, color, typography, or label content.

tasks.name: Design Revision Round 2
tasks.description: Second round of revisions. Final refinements before print-ready approval.

tasks.name: Print Sample Sent to Production
tasks.description: Final approved design files sent to printer for sample production. Awaiting physical sample.

tasks.name: Product Mockup — Pouch Standalone
tasks.description: Clean product mockup of the Shield pouch itself. Studio-style render for use on website, pitch decks, and marketing materials.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Poolside
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup placed in a luxury poolside setting. Resort/hotel pool environment with towels, lounge chairs, natural light.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Hotel Bathroom
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in a premium hotel bathroom. Displayed alongside amenities on marble countertop or vanity tray.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Spa / Wellness
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in a spa or wellness center setting. Clean, calming environment — treatment room, relaxation area, or towel station.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Beach / Resort Outdoor
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in an outdoor beach or resort environment. Cabana, beach bag, or outdoor lounge setting.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Event / Welcome Kit
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in an event or hospitality welcome kit context. Gift bag, conference swag, or hotel welcome amenity tray.

tasks.name: S1: Hero
tasks.description: Full-width immersive hero. Headline: "Protection That Meets You Where Life Happens". Dual CTAs: B2B "Request a Conversation" + DTC "Join the Waitlist". Lifestyle background image. Subtle parallax or Ken Burns effect. Staggered load animation.

tasks.name: S2: Brand Mission / Our Philosophy
tasks.description: Emotional anchor section — no CTA. Headline: "Simplifying Sun Protection for Real Life". Body copy about the gap Solvyn fills. Closing line: "Healthy skin should be accessible — not a luxury." Clean typographic treatment, large serif headline. Sand/beige background, staggered text reveal on scroll.

tasks.name: S3: Product Intro — Shield
tasks.description: Product teaser. Headline: "Shield by Solvyn". Subheadline: "Mineral protection. No compromises." Key attributes as badges/grid: FDA SPF, 100% Mineral, Hypoallergenic, Reef-Safe, Sealed & Tamper-Proof. CTA: "Learn More" → /shield. Asymmetric layout: product image + text.

tasks.name: S4: Why It Matters (Differentiation)
tasks.description: 4 value points: "Protection only works if people use it", "Convenience removes friction", "Sensitive skin deserves better", "Reef-safe by design". 2x2 grid or staggered cards, olive green accents, sand/beige background.

tasks.name: S5: Why Mineral
tasks.description: Educational section on mineral sunscreen benefits. Mineral vs. chemical comparison, safety advantages, environmental benefits.

tasks.name: S6: Trust & Credibility
tasks.description: Three sub-blocks: A) Medical Advisory — Dr. Eduardo Weiss, MD (Board-Certified Dermatologist, FAAD, 30+ years). B) Certifications — Dermatologist Approved, FDA Broad Spectrum, Hawai'i Act 104, Reef-Safe, Hypoallergenic. C) Partners — "Our Growing Network" with partner logos.

tasks.name: S7: B2B Value Proposition
tasks.description: Hospitality-focused section. Headline: "A Smarter Sunscreen Solution for Hospitality & Events". 5 benefits: hygiene, guest satisfaction, operational simplicity, sustainability, cost efficiency. CTA: "Request a Conversation". Split layout: resort lifestyle image + content.

tasks.name: Shield Product Page
tasks.description: Full product page: hero with product images, 6 key attributes, 7 ingredients, clean commitments, how-to-use steps, contact CTA.

tasks.name: About Us Page
tasks.description: Company story, mission statement, team bios, contact CTA.

tasks.name: Responsive Design & Mobile Optimization
tasks.description: All pages across breakpoints (desktop, tablet, mobile). Single-column collapse, touch-friendly CTAs (44px min), maintain padding proportions.

tasks.name: SEO Setup & Metadata
tasks.description: Page titles, meta descriptions, Open Graph tags, sitemap, robots.txt. SEO plugin configuration.

tasks.name: Scroll Animations & Hover Effects
tasks.description: Subtle animations: scroll-triggered fade-in + slide-up, staggered child reveals, hero load sequence, subtle parallax, smooth hover transitions on CTAs and cards. No aggressive motion.

tasks.name: Image Optimization & Placement
tasks.description: Compress all images, proper formats (WebP), alt text, responsive sizing, lazy loading.

tasks.name: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Lighthouse / PageSpeed audit. Lazy loading, caching, CSS/JS minification, CDN.

tasks.name: Domain, SSL & Analytics
tasks.description: Point domain to hosting, SSL certificate, Google Analytics / Tag Manager setup.

tasks.name: Cross-Browser Testing
tasks.description: Test on Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge. iOS Safari and Android Chrome. Fix rendering inconsistencies.

tasks.name: Client Review & Revisions
tasks.description: Present site for review. Collect feedback, implement revision rounds.

tasks.name: Final QA Pass
tasks.description: Full quality check: all links, forms, images, copy, responsive on all breakpoints.

tasks.name: Go-Live & Production Verification
tasks.description: Launch site. Verify SSL, redirects, forms, analytics, social meta tags.
